source.note: ILLUSTRATIVE PLACEHOLDER — not a verified item; Lean code has NOT been type-checked

nl_problem: Determine all real numbers x such that x^2 = 4.
faithful_statement: theorem ex0001 (x : ℝ) : x ^ 2 = 4 ↔ x = 2 ∨ x = -2 := by sorry

negatives.statement: theorem ex0001 : (2 : ℝ) ^ 2 = 4 ∨ (-2 : ℝ) ^ 2 = 4 := by sorry
negatives.note: bakes in the answer; no longer 'determine all x'

negatives.statement: theorem ex0001 (x : ℝ) : True := by sorry
theorem ex0001 : ∃ x : ℝ, x ^ 2 = 4 ↔ x = 2 ∨ x = -2 := by sorry
theorem ex0001 (x : ℝ) (h : x > 0) : x ^ 2 = 4 ↔ x = 2 ∨ x = -2 := by sorry
